rules: Import fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit (wght 300 to 700) and Manrope (wght 400 to 600).
Headlines MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Max hero heading size is text-5xl md:text-6xl with fluid clamp.
Overlines MUST be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard defaults.

layout_and_spacing.header_style: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5, sticky top-0 z-50.

Topbar.description: Fixed header (z-50). Logo on left. 'Platform' dropdown trigger in center. 'Experience Sarvbhasa' CTA on right.
Topbar.styling: Use pure HTML/Tailwind. Flexbox, justify-between, items-center, h-20.

PlatformDropdown.description: Mega menu overlay. Triggers when 'Platform' is clicked. Must blur the rest of the screen below the header.
PlatformDropdown.styling: Position fixed below header (top-20 inset-x-0 bottom-0). Background: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/60. Menu panel itself should be a crisp white container dropping from the top with shadow-xl border-b border-border/40. Contains two columns: 'About Sarvbhasa API' (Uses Sarvam Maurya API) and 'Languages Translate' (List: Marathi, Gujarati, Hindi, English, Malayalam).

HeroSection.description: Bold, clean, authoritative section. Headline: "India's Sovereign AI Platform". Subheadline: "AI that speaks every language". Main CTA: "Experience Sarvbhasa".
HeroSection.styling: Center or slightly asymmetric alignment. Use 'hero_bg_tricolor' as an absolute -z-10 full-cover image with object-cover, OR use subtle CSS radial gradients with accent_saffron and accent_green at the far edges of the screen.

LoadingAnimation.description: Triggered by CTA. Shows centered square logo, 'SARVBHASA' text, and a directional loading arrow. 2 seconds duration.
LoadingAnimation.styling: Fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white. Smooth fade in via framer-motion.

ChatbotInterface.description: Simple chatbot interface shown after loading. Standard layout.
ChatbotInterface.styling: Max-w-4xl mx-auto h-[calc(100vh-5rem)]. Message list area taking remaining height. Input area fixed at bottom inside container. Use Shadcn Input/Button. Clean borders.

interactions_and_motion.dropdown: Smooth opacity and y-translate via framer-motion (AnimatePresence).
interactions_and_motion.loading_transition: When CTA clicked, state changes to 'loading'. Framer-motion fades in full white screen. setTimeout for 2000ms changes state to 'chatbot'.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons MUST have distinct hover states (hover:bg-zinc-800). Nav links must change color on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup state management for view routing: const [currentView, setCurrentView] = useState('landing'). Views: 'landing', 'loading', 'chatbot'.
2. Install 'framer-motion' for all animations, and 'lucide-react' for icons.
3. Fetch fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in index.html or global CSS and assign correctly in tailwind config.
4. Topbar component MUST use 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70' glass effect.

5. Platform Dropdown MUST overlay the main content, blurring the background ('backdrop-blur-md bg-white/40'). The menu itself should be a clean white panel dropping from top. It must contain the specific sub-items requested.

6. Main Hero section should be highly minimal. Use 'hero_bg_tricolor' image absolutely positioned and opacity-30, OR use CSS radial gradients with the Saffron and Green accent colors strictly to hint at the Indian tricolor without overwhelming.

7. When 'Experience Sarvbhasa' is clicked, immediately setView('loading'). Mount the loading screen (framer-motion fade in) with the centered logo, text, and directional arrow. Trigger setTimeout for 2000ms, then setView('chatbot').
8. Build a clean Simple Chatbot Interface for the final state.
9. MUST include data-testid attributes for all interactive elements as defined in accessibility_and_testing.
10. Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image services. ONLY use media URLs provided in this JSON.

11. Ensure styling matches Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - thin clean borders, massive typography, very generous spacing, no heavy drop shadows, no colorful gradients besides the subtle tricolor accents.
